seo.title: Cosmetic Dentistry Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your cosmetic dental practice. Route unhappy patients to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Cosmetic Dentistry
hero.subheading: Great outcomes don’t always turn into Google reviews. ReviewFlo helps you follow up after visits without pressure.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Cosmetic Dental Practice Faces

items.heading: Patients leave happy and forget to review
items.body: They’re back to work and family, not your listing.

items.heading: Cost and expectations can fuel public posts
items.body: When someone feels let down, they may post before they call you.

items.heading: Asking chairside feels uncomfortable
items.body: You want focus on care, not a pitch.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Cosmetic Dentistry

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after checkout
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when the visit ends.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star patients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

benefits.sectionHeading: Why Cosmetic Dental Practices Choose ReviewFlo

items.heading: Fits checkout at the desk
items.body: Send the link right after the appointment.

items.heading: Private feedback first
items.body: You can address concerns before they become public reviews.

items.heading: One link for the practice
items.body: Same follow-up after cosmetic and routine visits.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will patients leave reviews for cosmetic dental work?
items.a: Yes, when you ask right after a visit they’re happy with.
They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.
No. It’s a link by text or email.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small practices.

items.q: Can we use this at multiple locations?
items.a: Yes. Use separate links per location if needed.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Cosmetic Dentistry Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
